---
title: "Pose-coupled native-interaction weighting in kinase ensemble docking: EGFR enrichment and CDK2 transfer"
short-title: "Pose-coupled native-interaction weighting"
author:
  - name: "Evangelia Mitropoulou"
    email: "evangelia.mitr@gmail.com"
    corresponding: true
    affiliations:
      - ref: forth-ice
  - name: "Dimitris Giannopoulos"
    email: "dimit.giannopoulos@ac.upatras.gr"
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipatras
affiliations:
  - id: forth-ice
    name: "Foundation for Research and Technology–Hellas (FORTH), Institute of Chemical Engineering Sciences (ICE-HT), Patras, Greece"
  - id: unipatras
    name: "University of Patras, Patras, Greece"
bibliography: references.bib
reference-section-title: References
format:
  typst:
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
    citeproc: true
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 10pt
    margin:
      x: 2.1cm
      y: 2.0cm
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
  docx: default
execute:
  echo: false
---

{{< include syndesis_jcheminformatics_v2_content.md >}}
